course: Layers and File I/O for C#

modules.name: Layers and File I/O
modules.description: Intermediate C# concepts including DateTime, collections, application layering, file I/O, serialization, structs, and unit testing with NUnit.

lessons.title: DateTime
topics: Working with DateTime types in C#
Formatting, parsing, and arithmetic with dates and times

lessons.title: Collections
topics: Lists, Dictionaries, and other generic collections
When to use each collection type

lessons.title: Weather Almanac — Layered Architecture (Lab)
topics: Building a layered Weather Almanac application
Implementing layers with class library projects

lessons.title: System.IO
topics: Reading and writing files with System.IO
StreamReader, StreamWriter, File, and Directory classes

lessons.title: Weather Almanac — File I/O (Exercise)
topics: Adding file I/O capability to the Weather Almanac application

lessons.title: Structs
topics: When and how to use structs in C#

lessons.title: NUnit Testing
topics: Introduction to unit testing with NUnit

lessons.title: Module Assessment
topics: Summative assessment covering DateTime, collections, layers, file I/O, serialization, structs, and NUnit

assessment.title: Module Assessment (M03)
items: Summative assessment covering all module topics
